option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from django.conf.urls.static import static from django.contrib import admin from django.urls import include, path, re_path from django.views.static import serve
urlpatterns = [ path('admin/', admin.site.urls), path('api/v1/', include('api.v1.urls')), ]
urlpatterns += static('static/', document_root='static') urlpatterns += static('media/', document_root='media') urlpatterns += [ re_path(r'^media/(?P<path>.*)$', serve, {'document_root': 'media'}), ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from django.conf.urls.static import static from django.contrib import admin from django.urls import include, path, re_path from django.views.static import serve
urlpatterns = [ path('admin/', admin.site.urls), path('api/v1/', include('api.v1.urls')), ]
urlpatterns += static('static/', document_root='static') urlpatterns += static('media/', document_root='media') urlpatterns += [ re_path(r'^media/(?P<path>.*)$', serve, {'document_root': 'media'}), ]
